name: Ikan hiu melayang-layang
lore:
Lore of Ikan hiu melayang-layang
                                    


Ikan hiu melayang-layang is an Indonesian brainrot created TikTok user, @noxaasht that shows a shark looked like human on a beach.hhhhhaa
Lyrics
Indonesian (Original)
Ikan Hiu Melayang-layang, i love you sayang MUUAAK PUUAAK BAU JIGONG. Konon di sebuah desa dekat pantai ada lagu terlarang yang tak boleh diputar di siang hari lagu itu berjudul Ikan Hiu Melayang-layang. Menurut legenda siapapun yang memutarnya saat matahari tepat di atas kepala akan memanggil hiu melayang. Makhluk absurd, yang muncul dari matahari dengan kaki yang besar siap menginjakmu HIII IMUTNYA!
English (Translation)
The Hovering Shark, I love you, honey, I'm sick of the smell of Jigong. It is said that in a village near the beach there is a forbidden song that must not be played during the day, the song is called The Hovering Shark. According to legend, anyone who plays it when the sun is directly overhead will summon a hovering shark. An absurd creature, which emerges from the sun with large feet ready to step on you Hiii SO CUTE!
